title: Docs Q&A
tagline: Answers questions about any product by reading its llms.txt / agents.md.
description: A documentation concierge. Give it a product or site and a question; it discovers the site's agent-readable surfaces (llms.txt, agents.md, sitemap), reads the relevant ones, and answers strictly from what it fetched — with source citations. Refuses to fabricate.
test: npx eve dev, then ask: "What does eve.dev say about defining tools?"
requires: AI Gateway access (Vercel) or an Anthropic API key
